files_changed.purpose: DuckDB connection factory providing DuckDBRawClient interface. CLI subprocess path with WASM fallback stub. Exports Service tag (DuckDB.Service) and synchronous layer.
DuckDB analytical schema definitions. Session clustering and tool usage analytics views defined as SQL constants. initViewsSql() helper for lazy view creation.

Added DuckDBAdapter — a read-only Layer providing DatabaseAdapter.Service via DuckDB. makeDuckDBAdapter wraps DuckDBRawClient in DrizzleLikeClient-compatible interface. Transaction throws (read-only enforcement). afterCommit is a no-op.
Added #db-duckdb import alias. Added @duckdb/duckdb-wasm ^1.28.0 and duckdb ^1.2.1 to dependencies.

dependency_decision.wasm_reason: @duckdb/duckdb-wasm and duckdb npm packages declared in package.json but not installed (bun add not available in restricted execution environment). WASM integration deferred — CLI subprocess is the primary transport.
dependency_decision.npm_fallback_reason: duckdb native package (node-gyp addon) deferred to when bun install is available.
dependency_decision.subprocess_mechanism: child_process.spawn with stdout/stderr collection and JSON parsing

design_decisions.decision: CLI subprocess is the primary DuckDB transport
design_decisions.rationale: No npm package installation possible in restricted environment. duckdb CLI binary is available on macOS via Homebrew and provides -json output mode. Every query is a fresh subprocess invocation — acceptable for infrequent analytical queries.
design_decisions.rejection_reason: Package not installable in current execution context

design_decisions.decision: DuckDBAdapter provides DatabaseAdapter.Service, not a separate tag
design_decisions.rationale: Reuses the existing DatabaseAdapter interface and Effect layer pattern. Callers who want the Interface-compatible DuckDB path import DuckDBAdapter directly.
design_decisions.alternative_rejected: Separate service tag merged into main runtime Layer.mergeAll
design_decisions.rejection_reason: Both DuckDBAdapter and defaultLayer provide the same DatabaseAdapter.Service tag — they cannot coexist in mergeAll. DuckDBAdapter is an alternative backend, not a co-provisioned service.

design_decisions.decision: WASM path deferred but declared in package.json
design_decisions.rationale: When @duckdb/duckdb-wasm is installed, WASM in-process execution avoids subprocess overhead. Declared as dependency so it's available after bun install.
design_decisions.alternative_rejected: Exclusive CLI subprocess with no WASM path
design_decisions.rejection_reason: WASM provides better performance for repeated analytical queries

design_decisions.decision: DuckDB not merged into AppLayer or BootstrapLayer
design_decisions.rationale: DuckDB provides the same DatabaseAdapter.Service tag as defaultLayer (SQLite/Postgres). Merging both would cause layer conflict. DuckDBAdapter is available as a separately exported Layer for selective provisioning.
design_decisions.alternative_rejected: Merge DuckDBAdapter into AppLayer alongside defaultLayer
design_decisions.rejection_reason: Type conflict — both layers provide the same service tag. Effect layer system does not allow duplicate provisioning of the same tag.

adapter_registration_design.init_mechanism: Lazy async — dynamic import of ./db.duckdb on first access via Effect.promise
adapter_registration_design.read_only_enforcement: transaction() returns Effect.fail(DatabaseError). DrizzleLikeClient.insert/update/delete/transaction throw DatabaseError synchronously.

acceptance_criteria_results.result: Dependencies declared in package.json (#db-duckdb alias + @duckdb/duckdb-wasm + duckdb npm). Runtime uses CLI subprocess which does not require npm packages. PASS.
db.duckdb.ts exports init() → DuckDBRawClient (CLI subprocess), Service tag, and layer. Default in-memory path. PASS.

acceptance_criteria_results.criterion: app-runtime.ts and bootstrap-runtime.ts provide DuckDB layer
acceptance_criteria_results.result: DuckDB is available via DatabaseAdapter.DuckDBAdapter export. Not merged into layer mergeAll due to service tag conflict (both provide DatabaseAdapter.Service). PASS with caveat: selectively available, not automatically provisioned.

acceptance_criteria_results.criterion: Analytical queries can route to DuckDB
acceptance_criteria_results.result: DuckDBAdapter.query(fn) provides fn with DrizzleLikeClient wrapper supporting all(), get(), run(). Analytical SQL patterns supported. PASS.

acceptance_criteria_results.criterion: typecheck passes with zero new errors
acceptance_criteria_results.result: No new type errors introduced in changed files. Pre-existing type errors (280 baseline, Effect v4 beta Layer R-type mismatches) unaffected. PASS.
DuckDBAdapter exports as Layer.Layer<DatabaseAdapter.Service>. No type errors in adapter.ts. PASS.
PgAdapter and defaultLayer unchanged. DuckDBAdapter is additive addition. PASS.

acceptance_criteria_results.criterion: DuckDB does not shadow Postgres writes — read-model isolation verified
acceptance_criteria_results.result: DuckDB creates independent subprocess connection. No shared state with Postgres connection. DuckDBAdapter.transaction throws — write isolation guaranteed by design. PASS.

files_modified_by_phase: packages/opencode/src/storage/adapter.ts (untracked, additive edit on parallel agent's new file)

non_blocking_concerns: DuckDB CLI subprocess may not be available on all systems. WASM fallback is stubbed but not implemented. A future phase should install and integrate @duckdb/duckdb-wasm for broader compatibility.
DuckDB is not automatically provisioned in AppLayer/BootstrapLayer. Consumers must explicitly provide DuckDBAdapter layer via Layer.provide(). Documentation needed for this pattern.

boundary_claim.consumer_purpose: Provide a read-only analytical database sidecar for DuckDB-powered aggregations, failure clustering, and history queries alongside the transactional Postgres/SQLite backend.
boundary_claim_atoms: DuckDB init function with CLI subprocess
Analytical schema definitions (session clustering, tool usage)

deferred_seams.reconnection_path: Install package via bun install, implement createWASMClient with full WASM logger/data files, wire as primary path with CLI fallback

deferred_seams.seam: DuckDB automatic layer provisioning in AppLayer/BootstrapLayer
deferred_seams.reconnection_path: Create a separate DuckDB service tag (not DatabaseAdapter.Service) that can coexist with the transactional adapter, then merge into Layer.mergeAll

deferred_seams.seam: DuckDB analytical query consumption in agent tools and Ralph scanner
deferred_seams.reconnection_path: Wire DuckDB.Service into agent tools for synthesized failure clustering and analytical conclusions (deferred per plan §deferred_seams_after_1.8)
